name: Spaghetti Sauce of Three Meats I.e.s.jjgf65a
recipeInstructions:
1. Brown the meat pieces in hot fat with the sliced onion and garlic.
2. Add the strained tomatoes and tomato paste. Stir in the seasoning and simmer for 1 to 2 hours.
3. Add lemon juice to taste.
4. Cook the spaghetti according to package instructions.
5. Heat the Italian meatballs separately until heated through.
6. Slice the cooked meat, which you have removed from the sauce, and combine with the sauce, meat, and meat balls. Serve.
